description.value:
Frequency once per minute

You learn to crowd the minds of other creatures with your psychic static and emit it as a protective field. Each adjacent creature attempts a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] against the next melee or ranged attack that you attempt against it before the end of your current turn.

Critical Failure The target is off-guard against melee and ranged attacks that you attempt against it until the end of your next turn.

Special As a 10-minute exploration activity, you can make any number of allies temporarily immune to this ability for 24 hours. Creatures that can't access telepathy, such as other static mind lashuntas, are immune to Deployed Static.
